# Language Review – Christmas-And-Its-Relationship-To-Lord-Jesus-1979-2, 1979-12-10

## Process

Review `transcript_uk.txt` (full paragraphed Ukrainian text) using 2 parallel reviewers + 1 critic filter.
This is review round 3 (previous rounds applied 9 corrections total).

## Results

### L. Language (Orthography + Grammar + Punctuation)
| # | Paragraph | Error | Context | Fix |
|---|-----------|-------|---------|-----|
| L1 | 34 | Non-standard grammar: "давайте" + synthetic future "знатимемо" | "давайте знатимемо, що Христос народжений у нас" | "знаймо, що Христос народжений у нас" (1st person plural imperative) |

### S. SY Domain (Capitalization + Terminology + Consistency)
| # | Paragraph | Error | Context | Fix |
|---|-----------|-------|---------|-----|
| S1 | 31 | Mistranslation of "doubtless awareness" (EN) as "бездумна впевненість" (= "thoughtless confidence") | "стан бездумної впевненості" | "стан безсумнівного усвідомлення" (Nirvikalpa — awareness without doubts) |
| S2 | 18 | Inconsistent transliteration of Samshaya: "саншая" (line 18) vs correct "самшая" (line 20) | "це саншая, тобто сумнів" | "це самшая, тобто сумнів" |
| S3 | 146 | Seeker's pronoun "Мій" capitalized as if deity; regular person's pronoun must be lowercase | "Ви Мій Ґуру Нанак Сахіб чи ні?" | "Ви мій Ґуру Нанак Сахіб чи ні?" |

### Critic Filter
| Source | # | Verdict | Reason |
|--------|---|---------|--------|
| L | L1 | Keep | "давайте + synthetic future" is non-standard Ukrainian; correct imperative form is "знаймо" |
| S | S1 | Keep | "doubtless awareness" (Nirvikalpa) is a distinct SY concept from "thoughtless awareness" (Nirvichara); "бездумна впевненість" conflates the two and mistranslates "doubtless" as "thoughtless" |
| S | S2 | Keep | Sanskrit "saṃśaya" has anusvara (ṃ → м); "самшая" on line 20 is correct; "саншая" on line 18 is an error |
| S | S3 | Keep | Seeker is a regular person; per capitalization rules, only deity pronouns are uppercase |

### Approved Corrections
| # | Paragraph | Error | Fix |
|---|-----------|-------|-----|
| 1 | 18 | "саншая" (inconsistent transliteration) | "самшая" |
| 2 | 31 | "стан бездумної впевненості" (mistranslation of "doubtless awareness") | "стан безсумнівного усвідомлення" |
| 3 | 34 | "давайте знатимемо" (non-standard grammar) | "знаймо" |
| 4 | 146 | "Мій" (seeker's pronoun incorrectly capitalized) | "мій" |

## Summary

- Language (L): 1 issue found, 1 approved by Critic
- SY Domain (S): 3 issues found, 3 approved by Critic
- Total corrections applied: 4

## Notes

The translation is of high quality overall. Key observations:

- **Deity pronouns**: Christ pronouns (Він/Його/Йому/Собою/Свій) are correctly uppercase throughout. Shri Mataji pronouns (Я/Мені/Моє/Мій) are consistently uppercase.
- **Glossary compliance**: All major SY terms follow glossary conventions — Кундаліні, Аґія, Вішуддхі, Сахасрара, Махавішну, Пранава, Брахма, Вірата, ракшаси, ґани, Майя, Чітта, бхути, Джаґадамба. Proper ґ used throughout.
- **Sahaja Yoga declension**: "Сахаджа Йозі" (locative) correctly uses ґ→з alternation per glossary.
- **Quotation marks**: Consistently «» throughout, no German „" or English "" found.
- **Em-dash**: Consistently ` – ` with spaces.
- **Spiritual terms**: Дух, Інкарнація, Істина correctly uppercase; его/суперего correctly lowercase.
- **Blessing formula**: "Нехай Бог благословить усіх вас" (line 35) matches glossary formula exactly.
- **Regular person pronouns**: Correctly lowercase in dialogue sections.
